activation.title: Activation
activation.reassign:
You can assign different
domain name to your device

apps.title: Applications
apps.emptyHeading: You don't have any apps installed yet. You can install one from App Center

app.backupConfirmText: This will backup app settings excluding files uploaded to the disk storage. Later you can restore it from Settings - Backup. Are you sure?

storage.title: Storage
storage.permissionsWarning: The more files you have on the disk the longer it takes to update permissions.
storage.initializeQuestion: Initialize disk by removing all data on it? (optional)
storage.externalDiskText: Every app is configured to use storage provided by the system (which is available at /data). This setting screen allows you to choose which attached disk to use for that storage. When activating a disk existing data is not copied to the selected disk. You can initialize a disk by formatting it to clear all the data or to make it compatible with the system.

access.title: Access
access.errorPortRange: Access port ({port}) has to be between 1 and 65535
access.accessPortText: If your Syncloud device is not visible directly from the Internet you will need to create a port mapping on your router. Ideally port 443 on your router should be mapped to port 443 on your device.
access.accessPortWarningText: Access port is not default 443. You may not be able to access your device from networks with strict firewalls allowing only port 443.
access.ipv4Text: Enables IP v4 DNS record and allows you to control which IP v4 address (public/private) is used for DNS. Syncloud DNS service verifies open public ip/port (Internet accessibility) for convenience on save.
access.ipv6Text: Enables IP v6 DNS record. Syncloud DNS service verifies device connection (Internet accessibility) for convenience on save.

activate.title: Activate
activate.premiumDescription: Syncloud manages your domain (like example.com). Subscription is required today.
activate.freeDescription: Syncloud manages [name].{domain} domain. Subscription is required in 30 days.

help.managedDomainText: Syncloud will manage DNS records for your personal domain name
help.freeAccountText: You need to register an account and have a valid Subscription no more than 30 days after the registration. It is only used to maintain dns records of your device. Data transfer happens directly between your apps and device.
help.premiumAccountText: You need to register an account and have a valid Subscription. It is only used to maintain dns records of your device. Data transfer happens directly between your apps and device.
help.deviceCredentialsText: Device credentials are used to access your device and all the apps (as admin user). They are stored on device and no one knows them. If you forget them you will need to reactivate your device.
